title: Review and fix Google Analytics implementation

requirements.summary: Verify that Google Analytics tracking code is properly installed in the frontend HTML with correct GA4 tracking ID format (G-XXXXXXXXXX)
acceptanceCriteria: Google Analytics tracking code exists in frontend/index.html
Tracking code is placed in the correct location (head section)

file_operations.description: Review and verify Google Analytics GA4 tracking code installation in the head section. Ensure the tracking ID follows the correct G-XXXXXXXXXX format, verify proper placement in the HTML document head, and check for any duplicate tracking code instances. If the tracking code is missing or incorrectly formatted, add or correct it using the standard GA4 implementation pattern with gtag.js.

requirements.summary: Ensure the tracking implementation includes the full HTTPS URL format for the Internet Computer deployment domain
acceptanceCriteria: Google Analytics configuration includes proper domain settings
Internet Computer canister URL format is correctly handled

file_operations.description: Review Google Analytics configuration to ensure it properly handles the Internet Computer canister deployment URL format with HTTPS protocol. Verify that any domain or URL configuration in the gtag.js setup correctly references the full https:// URL format and handles the .ic0.app or .icp0.io domain structure appropriately. Update configuration if needed to ensure proper tracking across the IC infrastructure.

requirements.summary: Verify that no user-visible UI elements or functionality are affected by the Analytics implementation review
acceptanceCriteria: No changes to any UI components or layouts
No changes to user interactions or functionality
Analytics code runs silently in the background
Application behavior remains identical to current version

file_operations.description: Verify that the Google Analytics implementation exists only in the head section as a script tag and does not introduce any visible UI elements, loading indicators, or modify application behavior. Ensure the tracking code runs asynchronously and silently without affecting page load performance or user experience. Confirm no inline styles, visible DOM elements, or blocking scripts are added that could impact the user interface.
